center.name: 茂物植物园
center.summary: 茂物植物园是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Barred eagle-owl，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It typically is a resident of evergreen forests with pools or streams, but also ranges into large gardens with tall, densely foliated trees, such as the Bogor Botanical Gardens found in West Java as well as wooded groves in cultivated country, both sometimes not far from human habitations
